landing.taglineStudents: Empowering 30 million university students to earn while they learn. No international fees, no barriers.
landing.taglineBusinesses: Instant, affordable access to Pakistan's top talent. Secure payments and verified results.
landing.missionDesc: Pakistan is home to more than 30 million university students and an ever-growing small-business sector. Gigligo bridges the gap between untapped talent and businesses that need reliable, cost-effective help.
